LanguageData.Ammo_762x51mmNATO_FMJ_Punched.label: 7.62x51mm NATO cartridge (FMJ) (Punched)
LanguageData.Ammo_762x51mmNATO_FMJ_Punched.descriptio: Large rifle bullet used in machine guns, sniper rifles and the occasional assault rifle.
